problems.cause: speed is a port of thr_mgmt, but in AGREE, when referenced in implementation scope, must be accessed through its binding or declared variable; the expression speed = pspg.speed is valid only in implementation scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the entire agree annex to the thr_mgmt.i implementation scope
